title: lamiophlomis rotata
intro: Lamiophlomis rotata, also known as Chinese sage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lamiophlomis rotata include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Lamiophlomis rotata can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
